heading: Call report simplification
label: 4805a Call report simplification
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Financial Regulatory Relief and Economic Efficiency Act of 2000, and also as part of the American Homeownership and Economic Opportunity Act of 2000, and not as part of title III of which comprises this chapter.Pub. L. 103–325Provisions similar to this section are contained in .section 4805 of this title

children.heading: Modernization of call report filing and disclosure system
children.label: a Modernization of call report filing and disclosure system
A
children.text: insured depository institutions and their affiliates may file such reports and statements electronically; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Federal banking agencies may make such reports and statements available to the public electronically; and
not later than 1 year after , report to the Congress and make recommendations for legislation that would enhance efficiency for filers and users of such reports and statements.December 27, 2000

children.heading: Uniform reports and simplification of instructions
children.label: b Uniform reports and simplification of instructions

children.text: to adopt a single form for the filing of core information required to be submitted under Federal law to all such agencies in the reports and statements referred to in subsection (a); and
to simplify instructions accompanying such reports and statements and to provide an index to the instructions that is adequate to meet the needs of both filers and users.

children.heading: Review of call report schedule
children.label: c Review of call report schedule

children.text: review the information required by schedules supplementing the core information referred to in subsection (b); and
eliminate requirements that are not warranted for reasons of safety and soundness or other public purposes.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: d Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “Federal banking agency” has the same meaning as in .section 1813 of this title
